title: Vtapia
compiled_truth: Vtapia is an external contact at [Pulsar](companies/pulsar). Over the corpus period (2001-03-16 to 2001-07-11), Vtapia sent 15 and received 15 emails, totalling 30 interactions. Top correspondents: [Geoff Storey](people/geoff-storey) (13), [Gstorey](people/gstorey) (2).
